rationale: No existing spec covers the visualize toggle state persistence across page navigations. The logsQueryBuilder-chart spec tests Build tab rendering and chart auto-selection but does not verify that the selected tab (Logs/Visualize/Build) is restored after navigating away and back. logspage.spec.js tests SQL query and function persistence across menu tabs but not the toggle group tab. logshistogram.spec.js tests histogram toggle persistence after queries but not the visualize toggle group. This is a distinct feature area that warrants its own spec file.
